texts: Moved the text box for creating and editing reviews to the main section of the modal (for Community Ratings page) or the main tab (for individual identity and E.G.O pages and changed it to the full sized version to make it more convenient for users making big reviews.
Show a browser warning when closing the rating modal if the user is currently creating or editing a review.
Switched email providers to better serve users using email login instead of Google OAuth.
Added Discord as an OAuth option. Logging in with multiple methods will automatically merge accounts if they share the same verified email.
Adjusted the order of login options in the Login page.
Added tooltips to the markdown buttons on the text editor.

Adjusted the layouts of the Dispense and Training Calculator page to prevent pieces of it being hidden behind the sidebar on certain screen widths and changed the Lux cheatsheet to use the same dragging behavior as other horizontally scrollable items on the site.
Added RR line 5 to the ending timers.
